title: Crolocos aurea
taxonomy: Crolocos aurea is actually known as Sisyrinchium californicum. It belongs to the family Iridaceae, commonly referred to as the iris family. This flowering plant is native to the western coast of North America, particularly in California and Oregon. The species name californicum indicates its geographical origin. As a member of the Iridaceae family, Sisyrinchium californicum is a type of flowering plant.
